context: Tests whether the agent computes ROI metrics correctly (ROAS, CPO, top performers), surfaces micro-influencer preference for ecommerce with evidence from the data, includes benchmark KPI guidance, discount code attribution rationale, and performance-based payment term recommendations.

checklist.name: ROAS calculation
checklist.description: The roi-report.json includes a ROAS field calculated as totalRevenue divided by totalSpend

checklist.name: CPO calculation
checklist.description: The roi-report.json includes a CPO (cost per order) field calculated as totalSpend divided by totalOrders

checklist.name: totalSpend correct
checklist.description: The roi-report.json totalSpend sums all compensationPaid values (correct value: 14480)

checklist.name: totalRevenue correct
checklist.description: The roi-report.json totalRevenue sums all revenue values from deliverable metrics (correct value: 15800)

checklist.name: top performers ranked
checklist.description: The roi-report.json includes a topPerformers array sorted by revenue descending, showing at least the top 3 performers

checklist.name: combined metrics structure
checklist.description: The data structures in roi-analysis.ts track both social metrics (views, likes, comments, shares) AND commerce metrics (clicks, orders, revenue) as separate concerns or combined in a metrics object

checklist.name: micro-influencer recommendation
checklist.description: The strategy-recommendation.md explicitly recommends prioritizing micro-influencers (10k–100k) for ecommerce, not mega or macro influencers

checklist.name: engagement/conversion evidence
checklist.description: The recommendation references the higher engagement or conversion rates of micro-influencers compared to mega-influencers (using the sample data or general guidance)

checklist.name: discount code attribution
checklist.description: The strategy-recommendation.md mentions using unique discount codes per creator as the most reliable attribution method (not just UTM links)

checklist.name: UTM link risk
checklist.description: The strategy-recommendation.md mentions the risk of UTM link modification by influencers and recommends short links or discount codes as mitigation

checklist.name: performance-based payment
checklist.description: The strategy-recommendation.md recommends a partial-payment-on-delivery with full-payment-after-hitting-minimum-orders structure (or equivalent performance clause)

checklist.name: benchmark KPIs
checklist.description: The strategy-recommendation.md recommends setting minimum acceptable KPIs (such as minimum ROAS, CPV, or engagement rate) before campaigns start

checklist.name: roi-report.json generated
checklist.description: A roi-report.json file is present with at minimum totalSpend, totalRevenue, roas, cpo, and topPerformers fields
